signals.reasoning: Cover the live TON short now. It has only retained 42% of peak P&L, warning level is urgent, the coin is still up 9.14% on the day, and liquidation distance is only about 4.7%, which is too tight to keep defending under caution.
BTC is already in a liquidation flush, so I would not chase a fresh short after the first dump leg.
ETH is also already flushing and no longer offers a clean fresh edge in either direction right here.
SOL is one of the cleaner reduced-size shorts because price is down more than 2.5% while open interest is still rising, which suggests fresh shorts are still pressing.
SPX remains a valid momentum short because the dump is confirmed and open interest is still building, which suggests the move is not fully exhausted yet.
VVV is still holding trend support despite the broader dump, so I would not force a short without a clearer breakdown.
FARTCOIN still leans short because it is holding up too well after the coordinated selloff and still reads as a short-covering rally rather than a clean washout.
PENGU is weak but not showing enough structure or crowding to justify a fresh directional trade.
VIRTUAL has some squeeze fuel from negative funding, but after this dump I would rather wait for a cleaner reset before taking either side.
PUMP remains a reduced-size short lean because it is down while funding is still positive, but the edge is only modest after the first flush.
ZEREBRO is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
